# Mr. Mythical

> Mythic+ and raid tools for World of Warcraft, plus free in-game addons for keystones, DPS gearing, and prep checks.

Mr. Mythical helps players plan Mythic+ keys, read Warcraft Logs, check boss damage profiles, and install related WoW addons from CurseForge or Wago.

## Web tools

- [Home](https://mrmythical.com/): Overview of the Mythic+ score calculator, raid log visualizer, boss profiles, and addons
- [Mythic+ Score Calculator](https://mrmythical.com/rating-calculator): Set a target rating and see which keystones get you there
- [Raid Log Visualizer](https://mrmythical.com/raid): Paste a Warcraft Logs report for per-second damage and healing
- [Boss Damage & Death Profiles](https://mrmythical.com/raid/boss): Averaged Mythic kill damage and death hotspots
- [About](https://mrmythical.com/about): Project background and contact

## WoW addons

- [All addons](https://mrmythical.com/addons): Mr. Mythical addon suite for World of Warcraft
- [Mythic+ Dashboard & Tooltips](https://mrmythical.com/addons/dashboard): Keystone tooltips with rewards, crests, score gains, and a planning dashboard
- [DPS Predictor & Gearing Dashboard](https://mrmythical.com/addons/dps-predictor): In-game gearing dashboard for bag loadouts, season scans, crest plans, and Great Vault, with SimulationCraft-trained DPS
- [Leaderboard](https://mrmythical.com/addons/leaderboard): Top Raider.IO Mythic+ runs on keystone tooltips
- [Gear Check](https://mrmythical.com/addons/gear-check): Group checks for enchants, gems, and durability
- [Assistant](https://mrmythical.com/addons/assistant): Unicorn companion with run commentary and optional keystone insert

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://mrmythical.com/privacy)
- [Cookie Policy](https://mrmythical.com/cookie)
